footer.description: Award-winning smart access technology that works every time. Even in space.
footer.subscribeDescription: Get updates on product launches and sweet deals

home.productsDeadboltGoDesc: Smart door lock with fingerprint recognition and secure access control.
home.productsKeybox3Desc: Smart key storage with 90+ key capacity. Perfect for short-term rentals.
home.productsPadlock2Desc: Military-grade smart padlock with advanced encryption and durability.
home.productsCellularDeadboltDesc: World's first mobile smart lock with built-in cellular connectivity.
home.productsPadlockLiteDesc: Lightweight portable smart padlock with fingerprint and PIN access.
home.testimonialsHeadingLine1: See how we helped customers scale
home.story_loftaffair_testimonial: MobiSure's smart locks reduced guest check-in time by 40% and eliminated lost keys. Our operations team now has complete control and full audit trails.
home.story_kayakomat_testimonial: With MobiSure's Padlock 2, we scaled from 5 to 50+ kayak sharing stations without any security concerns. The reliability is unmatched.
home.story_hornbach_testimonial: Our tool rental service scaled rapidly thanks to MobiSure. Customers can pick up and return equipment 24/7 with zero staff involvement.
home.story_grand-view_testimonial: Guest satisfaction scores jumped 15 points after deploying MobiSure access solutions. The mobile key experience is exactly what modern travellers expect.
home.story_stayking_testimonial: We reduced check-in complaints by 90% after switching to MobiSure smart locks across all 200+ properties. Support is incredible.
home.story_urbanest_testimonial: Managing access for 300 apartment units is now as simple as a few taps. MobiSureWork handles everything from tenant onboarding to revocation.
home.comingSoonDescLine1: Be the first to experience it. Sign up for exclusive launch updates — and get
home.comingSoonDescStrong: priority access to reserve your unit
home.comingSoonSuccessText: We'll notify you at {email} when pre-orders open.

durabilityTabs.label: Large Shock and Impact
durabilityTabs.desc: Protect your vehicles and other valuables with confidence. Tough and reliable security without holding you back.

durabilityTabs.label: Sub zero temperatures
durabilityTabs.desc: Great for securing assets in the nordics and cities in colder regions. Our smart locks will still work.

durabilityTabs.label: Harsh Weather
durabilityTabs.desc: From the icy cold to extreme heat, our locks remain steadfast. Tested against swift temperature changes — plunging to -20°C and soaring to 50°C in moments. Dependable security without compromise.

mobisurehome.name: MobiSureHome
mobisurehome.description: Suited for startups or individuals with under 30 rooms or 5–20 properties. Complete access control right out of the box.
mobisurehome.expand: Perfect for Airbnb hosts, small property managers, and individual landlords. Includes PIN code management, app-based remote access, and activity logs — no technical setup required.

mobisureaccess.name: MobiSureAccess
mobisureaccess.description: For API & SDK integrations. Build custom integrations with our robust developer tools and documentation.
mobisureaccess.expand: Full REST API, webhooks, and mobile SDKs for iOS and Android. Ideal for software companies who want to embed MobiSure access into their own platform.

mobisureconnect.name: MobiSureConnect
mobisureconnect.description: Ecosystem of 40+ pre-built integrations. Sync with property management, booking, and access control systems.
mobisureconnect.expand: One-click connections to Airbnb, Booking.com, Guesty, Hostaway, and 40+ more. Auto-generate guest PIN codes on booking confirmation — zero manual work.

mobisurework.name: MobiSureWork
mobisurework.description: For enterprises with 100+ access points. Dedicated support, custom solutions, and managed deployment.
mobisurework.expand: Enterprise SLA, dedicated account manager, bulk device management, custom reporting dashboards, and on-site deployment support.

home.privacyBody: Having an iron clad commitment to the compliance of GDPR, international data privacy laws and standards, we safeguard our users' access data as if it were our own.

technology.heroSubtitle: Our proprietary offline PIN technology generates time-based access codes that work even without internet, Bluetooth, or cellular connection.
technology.howItWorksPara: Two simple flows power every MobiSure lock
technology.step1Desc: Open MobiSure app, scan device QR code
technology.step2Desc: App connects to MobiSure Cloud to register device
technology.step3Desc: Encryption keys saved to device memory
technology.step4Desc: App creates time-based access code offline
technology.step5Desc: Device checks code using stored credentials
technology.step6Desc: Door unlocks instantly — no internet needed
technology.onePinDesc: Valid for a single use. Perfect for guests or deliveries.
technology.timePinDesc: Valid for a specific time window. Great for short-term rentals.
technology.recurringPinDesc: Repeats on a schedule. Ideal for cleaners or regular staff.
technology.permanentPinDesc: Always valid. For owners and permanent residents.
technology.ctaSubtitle: Start with a free demo and see algoPIN™ in action.

integrations.heroSubtitle: MobiSure integrates with the tools you already use — PMS, booking platforms, and smart home ecosystems.
integrations.pmsDesc: Sync guest check-ins, auto-generate PINs, and manage access across your entire portfolio from one dashboard.
integrations.bookingDesc: Automate access for Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com and more. Guests receive PIN codes instantly upon booking confirmation.
integrations.smartHomeDesc: Works with Alexa, Google Home, and major smart home platforms for a unified living experience.
integrations.apiDesc: Build custom integrations with our RESTful API. Full documentation, SDKs, and sandbox environment available.
integrations.ctaSubtitle: Set up your first integration in minutes.

caseStudies.heroTitle: See how we helped customers scale
caseStudies.heroSubtitle: Real stories from property managers, hospitality businesses, and enterprises that transformed their access control with MobiSure.
caseStudies.ctaTitle: Ready to write your own success story?
caseStudies.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of businesses that trust MobiSure for smart access.

about.heroSubtitle: MobiSure was founded with one belief: access should be frictionless, secure, and always available — even when the internet isn't.
about.missionBody: We design smart locks and access solutions that work offline, survive extreme conditions, and scale from a single apartment to thousands of properties worldwide.
about.value1Desc: Every product is built with security as the foundation, not an afterthought.
about.value2Desc: Our offline-first technology means your locks work even when connectivity fails.
about.value3Desc: We listen, iterate, and build products that solve real problems for real people.
about.ctaSubtitle: We're always looking for great people to help build the keyless future.

careers.heroSubtitle: We're a team of builders, designers, and problem-solvers passionate about making access frictionless for everyone.
careers.benefitsTitle: We Take Care of Our People
careers.benefitsIntro: Working at MobiSure means more than just a job — it's a career with purpose, growth, and real rewards.
careers.inclusivityBody: We celebrate different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. Our team spans 30+ nationalities across Singapore, Vietnam, and beyond.
careers.ctaSubtitle: We're always looking for great talent. Send us your CV and we'll keep you in mind.

shortTermRental.heroSubtitle: Auto-generate guest PINs, integrate with your PMS, and manage all your properties from one dashboard.
shortTermRental.featuresSubtitle: Expand your Short Term Rental Business by keeping overheads low and never having to worry about managing keys ever again.
shortTermRental.feat1Desc: It is simple to integrate with PMSs such as Avantio, Smoobu, HostAway and 40 other service providers with MobiSureConnect.
shortTermRental.feat2Desc: Streamline operational workflows by sending access credentials instantly to tenants via email, sms without having to handover keys.
shortTermRental.feat3Desc: With over 100,000 testing cycles, our smart locks have been stress tested to the absolute limit and are built to withstand the harshest conditions.
shortTermRental.noWifiDesc: MobiSure's proprietary algoPIN™ technology generates time-based access codes offline. Guests always get in — even when the internet is down, Bluetooth is off, or there's no cellular signal.
shortTermRental.multiFamilyTitle: Smart security tailored for multi-family properties
shortTermRental.multiFamilySubtitle: From apartment complexes to managed buildings — MobiSure scales to fit every property type with centralized access control.
shortTermRental.productTitle: Best smart locks for short term rentals
shortTermRental.productDesc_deadboltGo: The Deadbolt Go features a keypad with auto-generated PINs, real-time access logs, and works completely offline. Perfect for Airbnb, VRBO, and vacation rentals.
shortTermRental.productDesc_deadbolt2e: Easy to install, the world's slimmest deadbolt is universally aesthetic that fits well with most decor and doors.
shortTermRental.productDesc_keybox3: Perfect for properties with multiple access points. The Keybox is spacious enough to fit all your keys.
shortTermRental.productDesc_retrofitLock: No Heavy Drilling Needed. Easily attaches to your existing lock from the inside—no need for extensive modifications.
shortTermRental.pmsSubtitle: MobiSure integrates with 40+ property management systems and booking platforms. Set it up once and let automation handle the rest.
shortTermRental.pmsF1: Auto PIN creation on booking confirmation
shortTermRental.durabilitySubtitle: Tested from -20°C to 50°C, IP65 waterproof, and shock-resistant. Our locks perform wherever your properties are.
shortTermRental.formSubtitle: Tell us about your properties and we'll find the right solution for you.
shortTermRental.formSuccessDesc: Your guide is on its way. Our team may also reach out within 1 business day.
shortTermRental.ebookTitle: Your Guide to Effortless Check-ins with Smart Locks & PMS Integration
shortTermRental.ebookB1: Automate access and reclaim your time.
shortTermRental.ebookB2: Quick install and direct connection to Airbnb/PMS — no manual messaging needed.
shortTermRental.ebookB3: Manage 1 or 1000 properties with zero hassle — even when you're offline.

accessControl.heroTitle: Flexible Smart Access Control That Grows with Your Business
accessControl.heroSubtitle: Manage every door, floor, and gate from a single platform — whether you run 10 units or 10,000.
accessControl.essentialsTitle: All the Access Control Security Essentials
accessControl.col1Desc: Connect seamlessly with leading PMS platforms to automate check-in and check-out. No manual key handovers, no front desk bottlenecks.
accessControl.col2Title: Access Control for Every Entry Point
accessControl.col2Desc: Manage doors, gates, elevators, and amenity areas from one unified dashboard. Set permissions by role, time, and location with ease.
accessControl.col3Title: Get Real-Time Alerts and Audit Logs
accessControl.col3Desc: Receive instant notifications for every access event. Maintain a full audit trail for compliance, security reviews, and incident investigation.
accessControl.productsSubtitle: Hardware and software built to work together, seamlessly.
accessControl.product1Desc: The Switch is a compact and adaptable door controller that brings 9–24V electric locks and access devices into the MobiSure ecosystem.
accessControl.product2Desc: Streamline operations using a unified web platform that offers seamless access control and security management. Integrate security with advanced data insights and expanded capabilities.
accessControl.mapTitle: Control and Have Visibility Over Every Multifamily Access Point
accessControl.mapSubtitle: From the main entrance to individual unit doors — every access point under your control.
accessControl.integrationsTitle: Connect with Ready-Made Third-Party MFR Integrations
accessControl.integrationsSubtitle: Works out-of-the-box with the platforms your team already uses.
accessControl.missionStatement: MobiSure revolutionizes the way property owners secure and manage access for their homes, buildings and shared assets, that works every time and anywhere in the world.

productDetail.techDesc: Our proprietary algorithm generates time-sensitive PINs that work without any network connection — giving you full control even when the internet is unavailable.
productDetail.techFootnote: algoPIN™ is a registered trademark of MobiSure. Time-based PIN generation requires initial clock synchronization.
productDetail.securityDesc: Your access data stays yours. We never sell personal information, and all data is encrypted in transit and at rest on AWS Singapore infrastructure — compliant with GDPR and regional data protection laws.
productDetail.ctaDesc: Book a personalized demo with our team and discover how {name} can transform your property's access management.
productDetail.pinOneTimeDesc: Expires immediately after a single use — ideal for deliveries and one-off visits.
productDetail.pinDurationDesc: Valid for a set time window, such as a guest check-in period.
productDetail.pinRecurringDesc: Activates on a weekly schedule — perfect for cleaning staff.
productDetail.pinPermanentDesc: Always-valid access for owners and trusted contacts.
productDetail.deadboltGoDesc: Replace your existing deadbolt with a sleek, keyless lock that works offline using algoPIN™ technology. No wiring, no Wi-Fi dependency — just reliable access control.
productDetail.deadboltGoB1Desc: Generate time-sensitive PINs without internet connection.
productDetail.deadboltGoB2Desc: Fits most standard doors in under 15 minutes.
productDetail.deadboltGoB3Desc: Grant flexible access for guests and recurring staff.
productDetail.deadboltGoB4Desc: Automatically locks after a set delay for added security.
productDetail.deadboltGoB5Desc: Get notified before the battery runs out.
productDetail.deadboltGoB6Desc: Built-in alarm triggers on forced entry attempts.
productDetail.deadboltGoB8Desc: Manage all access via the MobiSure app.
productDetail.deadboltGoQuoteText: We installed Deadbolt Go across 40 units and it transformed how we handle guest access. No more physical keys, no more lockouts.
productDetail.keybox3Desc: A weatherproof smart key lockbox with a PIN-protected shackle. Perfect for property managers, contractors, and short-term rentals where key handoff needs to be contactless and secure.
productDetail.keybox3B1Desc: Works without Wi-Fi using time-based PIN generation.
productDetail.keybox3B2Desc: Built to withstand rain, dust, and extreme temperatures.
productDetail.keybox3B4Desc: Compact design with secure internal key storage.
productDetail.keybox3B5Desc: Issue single-use codes for delivery and service staff.
productDetail.keybox3B6Desc: Set time-limited access windows for guests.
productDetail.keybox3B7Desc: Permanent or portable mounting options included.
productDetail.keybox3B8Desc: Monitor access logs and manage PINs remotely.
productDetail.padlock2Desc: A rugged, weatherproof smart padlock designed for gates, storage units, and outdoor use. Powered by algoPIN™ for truly wireless, offline access control.
productDetail.padlock2B1Desc: No Wi-Fi needed — generate valid PINs anytime.
productDetail.padlock2B2Desc: Suitable for outdoor and industrial environments.
productDetail.padlock2B4Desc: Cut-resistant stainless steel for maximum durability.
productDetail.padlock2B5Desc: Set time-limited access for cleaners, contractors.
productDetail.padlock2B6Desc: See a complete history of every unlock event.
productDetail.padlock2B7Desc: Charge externally if battery runs low.
productDetail.padlock2B8Desc: Supports one-time, duration, recurring, and permanent PINs.
productDetail.padlock2VideoTitle: Ark Futsal × MobiSure — Padlock 2 in the Field
productDetail.padlock2QuoteText: Our facility managers rely on Padlock 2 for over 200 storage units. The offline PIN feature means we never worry about connectivity issues.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltDesc: The only smart deadbolt with built-in cellular connectivity — no hub, no Wi-Fi required. Get real-time alerts, remote lock/unlock, and instant access log updates from anywhere in the world.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB1Desc: Connects directly via LTE — no hub or router needed.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB2Desc: Instant push notifications for every lock and unlock event.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB3Desc: Control access from anywhere in the world via the app.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB4Desc: Offline PIN access if cellular signal is unavailable.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB5Desc: View who accessed the door and when, in real time.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB6Desc: Automatic relocking after a configurable time interval.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB7Desc: Audible alarm and push notification on forced entry.
productDetail.cellularDeadboltB8Desc: API integration available for property management systems.
productDetail.padlockLiteDesc: A lightweight, entry-level smart padlock perfect for homes, lockers, and bike storage. Uses algoPIN™ for offline PIN access — no app required for guests.
productDetail.padlockLiteB1Desc: Share time-sensitive PINs without any app needed.
productDetail.padlockLiteB2Desc: Under 200g — ideal for lockers and travel bags.
productDetail.padlockLiteB3Desc: Up to 12 months on a single CR2 battery.
productDetail.padlockLiteB4Desc: Unlock hands-free via the MobiSure app.
productDetail.padlockLiteB5Desc: Track all access events in the app.
productDetail.padlockLiteB6Desc: Works standalone without any gateway device.
productDetail.padlockLiteB7Desc: Ready to use in under 3 minutes.
productDetail.padlockLiteB8Desc: Send PINs via SMS, WhatsApp, or email.
productDetail.mortiseTouchDesc: A premium fingerprint and PIN mortise lock for residential and light commercial doors. Sleek stainless steel design with capacitive touch keypad and algoPIN™ offline access.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB1Desc: Stores up to 100 fingerprints for keyless entry.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB2Desc: Backlit touch keypad with anti-peep scramble.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB3Desc: Issue offline PINs for guests without internet.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB4Desc: Fingerprint, PIN, RFID card, and app unlock.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB5Desc: Automatically secures the door after every entry.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB6Desc: Keep unlocked during business hours with one tap.
productDetail.mortiseTouchB8Desc: Visual and audible alert when battery is low.
productDetail.mortiseTouchQuoteText: The Mortise Touch has been flawless. Guests love the fingerprint entry and we love the ability to create one-time PINs remotely.
productDetail.gateLockDesc: Designed for sliding and swing gates, this heavy-duty smart lock brings algoPIN™ access control to your property perimeter. No wiring, no Wi-Fi — just reliable, weatherproof security.
productDetail.gateLockB1Desc: Fully weatherproof for year-round outdoor use.
productDetail.gateLockB2Desc: Versatile design for most gate configurations.
productDetail.gateLockB3Desc: Offline PIN generation for guests and contractors.
productDetail.gateLockB4Desc: Reinforced lock bolt rated for high-traffic installations.
productDetail.gateLockB5Desc: Delivery-friendly codes that expire after a single use.
productDetail.gateLockB6Desc: Walk-up Bluetooth unlock for frequent users.
productDetail.gateLockB7Desc: Notifies you immediately of any forced access attempt.

homeCare.teaserTitle: Purchase the annual Home Care security plan and receive a smart lock & camera for free
homeCare.teaserSub: Home Care security plan benefits include:
homeCare.benefit1Detail:
Entry History – 24/7 Security Control

Track all home entry history anytime, anywhere directly from your phone. Know exactly who entered your home and when – even when you're away.

Clearly distinguish between family members and strangers, keeping you in control at all times. No more worry about forgetting to lock the door or unnecessary suspicions.

Take control of your home security – 24/7, with just one tap.
homeCare.benefit2Title: Theft intrusion alert to homeowner & local police
homeCare.benefit2Detail: When abnormal signs are detected such as unauthorized door opening, multiple wrong code entries, or physical tampering with the lock, the system activates an immediate alert. You receive an instant notification on your phone, letting you know the situation even when you're not home. This allows you to proactively check, contact family members, or alert local security when needed to handle the situation in time. Minimize loss risks and protect your family's safety proactively.
homeCare.benefit3Title: Fire & explosion auto-alert to homeowner & fire department
homeCare.benefit3Detail: Smart temperature and smoke sensors detect anomalies in just 3 seconds. You receive an emergency notification on your phone. Simultaneously, the system automatically notifies the nearest fire department with complete location information. Giving you and your family time to safely evacuate, minimizing property damage and life risks. More peace of mind than ever with a proactive 24/7 protection system!
homeCare.benefit4Title: Full insurance coverage for theft & fire risks
homeCare.benefit4Detail: The Home Care plan includes comprehensive insurance for all theft and fire risks, with compensation up to hundreds of millions of VND. You don't need to worry about repair costs, asset replacement, or major losses. This is real financial protection, giving you peace of mind to enjoy life without fear of unexpected risks. With a reasonable fee, you have double protection: technology + insurance!
homeCare.priceSummary: Home Care security plan: 1,900,000 VND/year or 200,000 VND/month
homeCare.priceDetail: For just 200,000 VND per month, you own all premium benefits. This is an extremely competitive price compared to individual installations (which can cost 2-3 times more). Save costs but get comprehensive protection – the smartest choice today!

forgotPassword.step1Desc: Enter your phone number or email address.
forgotPassword.step4Desc: You'll use this password to sign in to your account. Use at least 8 characters including letters, numbers and special characters.
forgotPassword.logoutAll: Sign out from all other devices
forgotPassword.successDesc: You can now sign in with your new password.
forgotPassword.errIdentifierRequired: Please enter your email or phone number
forgotPassword.errPasswordWeak: Password must have at least 8 characters, 1 uppercase letter and 1 special character.

forgotPassword.errSendOtpFailed: Unable to send verification code right now. Please try another method.
forgotPassword.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
